◎译　　名　时间的断面
◎片　　名　broken side of time
◎年　　代　2013
◎产　　地　美国
◎类　　别　剧情 / 纪录片 / 情色

◎导　　演　戈尔曼·贝沙尔 Gorman Bechard
◎编　　剧　戈尔曼·贝沙尔 Gorman Bechard

◎简　　介  

　　Over a million women have modeling portfolios online. BROKEN SIDE OF TIME is the story of Dolce, one of the models who've made a career of it. But now 30, and tired of competing with 18-year-olds, Dolce realizes what makes her feel most alive is also killing her. Before starting a new career behind the camera, she embarks on a long road trip home, shooting with her favorite pho...
